56.reason: [If the file "article.txt" does not exist or cannot be opened, fopen returns NULL, and subsequent fgets will cause undefined behavior. The program should check if article is NULL and handle the error.]

80.reason: [Loop condition should be i < num, not i <= num. When i == num, count[i] is uninitialized (except cnt=0), leading to undefined behavior in strcmp.]
